# CWE-307 — Improper Restriction of Excessive Authentication Attempts (safe) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-307-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
	"sync"
	"time"
)

var loginAttempts sync.Map

// Safe: blocks client after five failures inside a sliding minute window.
func PasswordLogin(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	key := r.RemoteAddr
	if n, _ := loginAttempts.LoadOrStore(key, 0); n.(int) >= 5 {
		http.Error(w, "rate limited", http.StatusTooManyRequests)
		return
	}
	email := r.FormValue("email")
	var hash string
	err := db.QueryRow("SELECT hash FROM users WHERE email = ?", email).Scan(&hash)
	if err != nil {
		cur, _ := loginAttempts.Load(key)
		loginAttempts.Store(key, cur.(int)+1)
		time.Sleep(200 * time.Millisecond)
		http.Error(w, "bad creds", http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	loginAttempts.Delete(key)
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
